name: Nikko Remigio
headline: Deep Chiefs depth piece with no fantasy role
body:
Remigio has been on the field for three NFL seasons in name only, logging tiny snap shares behind Kansas City`s established pass catchers. The 2025 line is a rounding error: 14 games but a 3.3 percent snap share, eight routes, one target, one catch for 21 yards and 3.2 fantasy points. His 2024 was similarly empty, five games and a 20.6 percent snap rate that produced six targets and two grabs for 48 yards. The advanced metrics, however flashy on a one-catch sample, mean nothing at this volume.

Buried behind Xavier Worthy and the rest of the Chiefs` receiver and tight end depth, plus his return-game role, Remigio has no realistic path to offensive targets in 2026. There is simply no scenario short of a cascade of injuries in which he becomes fantasy-relevant. He is a clear waiver-wire ignore in all redraft formats and carries no dynasty value beyond a camp-body roster spot. Do not draft him in any league.
